title: Rocks Comes to Elbaf
description: On pages 4–6, this part follows Unknown person #4, Hajrudin, Jarul, Luffy, King Harald, Children as The story turns toward Elbaf’s past, Loki, Rocks, Harald, and the ancient grudges shaping the island’s present conflict.
scene: The story turns toward Elbaf’s past, Loki, Rocks, Harald, and the ancient grudges shaping the island’s present conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: He's cursed...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: ...and the bitterness fostered as spirits broke...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Hey, wait!!

dialogue.speaker: Hajrudin
dialogue.text: Hey, hajrudin!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yer brother doomed this country with his curse!!

dialogue.speaker: Jarul
dialogue.text: As his elder brother...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You'll take responsibility as a sacrifice!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What are you talking about?! dontcha know my son's a cutie who's gonna be the world's longest living man?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Can it, IDA!! You're NOTHING BUT AN OUTSIDER WHO SEDUCED HARALD!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Go to Hell!! I love this country!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't you lay a finger on my mom!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'm gonna Flatten you!!

dialogue.speaker: King Harald
dialogue.text: King Harald!!

dialogue.speaker: Children
dialogue.text: Daddy!!

dialogue.speaker: King Harald
dialogue.text: King Harald!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Brothers!! You must not fight amongst each other!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: The king?!

dialogue.speaker: Loki
dialogue.text: word reached me about Loki's birth...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: ...and the recent famine.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was building a rapport with various nations...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: When the news came, our allies acted without hesitation.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They loaded tonnes of food and supplies to be shipped here!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Humans may be small in Stature, but not will!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Our Allied Nations came together to ensure that...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...We got enough to truly fill and satiate our giant bellies.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: We will graciously accept their aid!!

dialogue.speaker: King Harald
dialogue.text: Harald!:

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How are we supposed to dock on the island?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Gya ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Dig in and fill your hearts with gratitude!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If these good folk are ever in a pinch...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It'll be our job to return the favor with all our might!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Remember, this tiny world is ours to share!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Queen Estrid continued to publicly declare that the plagues suffered by Elbaf...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...were brought on by 'The Accursed Prince,' right up until the eve of Harald's return.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She denounced her son with bitter hatred until her final angushed breath.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He can't even smile for me... I guess it makes sense, he did just lose his mother...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Naturally, the people believed her passing was part of the curse...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: LOK!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: My son!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He was born with a condition that affects his eyes...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I understand, what a pity...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Well, he could see, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: At only a few months old...

dialogue.speaker: Loki
dialogue.text: ...LOKI had given up on love.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: You sure have a lot of scrapes...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: No, those are...

summary: This part advances the Elbaf’s Buried History through 47 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
